Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality.unionfind

Class Node

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.provers.equality.unionfind.Node
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Node>
public final class Node extends Object implements Comparable<Node>
Node in the union-find data structure of equal constants.

Each node but the root of the tree has a parent which points towards the root. The root of a tree contains the information of all nodes in the tree. This information is located in the data structrue rootFactsInequalities, rootInstantiations, rootQueryEqualities, rootQueryInequalities.
